message:
feat(distributed): add structured tracing to agent stream lifecycle

Enrich distributed agent log lines with agent_id, session_id, seq,
messages_sent, messages_dropped, and context-specific counters
(heartbeat_count, lag_repair_count, reconnect_attempt). The pane
snapshot function now returns the count of panes sent. This gives
operators full protocol lifecycle visibility for diagnosing reconnect
storms, lag repairs, and message loss without behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
